salmanshh_2dwater.name: 2DWater
salmanshh_2dwater.description: Liquid surface simulation behavior for Tiled Background and Sprite objects. Deforms the host object mesh using a spring-damper model to produce interactive water ripples.

tension.name: Tension
tension.desc: Spring stiffness pulling each column toward its rest height. Low values produce slow, wide waves. High values produce tight, fast ripples.

dampening.name: Dampening
dampening.desc: Energy decay per tick. High values produce thick, viscous water. Low values allow long oscillation.

spread.name: Spread
spread.desc: Lateral propagation rate between adjacent columns. Controls how fast a disturbance travels horizontally.

meshColumns.name: Mesh Columns
meshColumns.desc: Number of simulation columns and mesh control points on the top row. Minimum 2, clamped at init. Can be changed at runtime via SetMeshColumns.

meshRows.name: Mesh Rows
meshRows.desc: Number of mesh rows. Only row 0 (the top edge) is deformed by the simulation. Minimum 2, clamped at init.

autoWaves.name: Enable Auto-Waves
autoWaves.desc: Continuously drives sinusoidal surface motion without any ApplyForce calls. When enabled, idle detection is bypassed.

waveLength.name: Wave Length
waveLength.desc: Spatial wavelength of auto-waves in pixels.

period.name: Period
period.desc: Time in seconds for one full auto-wave cycle. Setting to 0 freezes phase accumulation.

magnitude.name: Magnitude
magnitude.desc: Amplitude of auto-waves in pixels above the rest surface.

autoPhysicsForce.name: Auto Physics Force
autoPhysicsForce.desc: When enabled, automatically applies a splash impulse when any Physics-behavior instance enters the surface zone.

physicsForceMultiplier.name: Physics Force Multiplier
physicsForceMultiplier.desc: Scales the impacting instance's velocityY to a force magnitude.

physicsSurfaceRadius.name: Physics Surface Radius
physicsSurfaceRadius.desc: Horizontal splash radius in pixels for Physics auto-impacts.

surfaceDetectionDepth.name: Surface Detection Depth
surfaceDetectionDepth.desc: Half-height in pixels of the surface detection zone above and below the water's top edge.

idleThreshold.name: Idle Threshold
idleThreshold.desc: Maximum absolute column speed below which the simulation is considered at rest and ticking halts. 0 disables idle detection.

spreadPassCount.name: Spread Pass Count
spreadPassCount.desc: Number of lateral spread iterations per tick. Min 1, max 16. Reduce for background water.

SetMeshColumns.description: Changes the number of simulation columns at runtime. Wave state is resampled. Do not call every tick.

columns.name: Columns
columns.desc: Number of columns. Values below 2 are clamped to 2.

SetMeshRows.description: Changes the number of mesh rows at runtime. Column simulation state is preserved. Do not call every tick.

rows.name: Rows
rows.desc: Number of rows. Values below 2 are clamped to 2.

SetIdleThreshold.description: Sets the idle detection speed threshold at runtime. 0 disables idle detection.

threshold.name: Threshold
threshold.desc: Max absolute column speed to be considered idle.

SetSpreadPassCount.description: Sets the number of spread pass iterations per tick. Clamped to [1, 16].

SetPhysicsAutoForceEnabled.description: Enables or disables Physics auto-force detection. Disabling clears tracked instances.

SetPhysicsForceMultiplier.description: Sets the velocity-to-force scale factor at runtime.

SetPhysicsSurfaceRadius.description: Sets the horizontal splash radius for Physics auto-impacts at runtime.

ApplyForce.display-text: Apply force at X={0}, force={1}, radius={2}
ApplyForce.description: Applies a vertical impulse to the water surface at a world X coordinate.

x.name: X
x.desc: World X coordinate of the impact.

force.name: Force
force.desc: Force magnitude. Positive = upward displacement, negative = downward.

SetDampening.description: Sets the energy decay rate at runtime.

SetSpread.description: Sets the lateral propagation rate at runtime.

SetTension.description: Sets the spring constant at runtime.

SetMagnitude.description: Sets the auto-wave amplitude in pixels.

SetPeriod.description: Sets the auto-wave cycle duration in seconds. 0 freezes phase accumulation.

SetWaveLength.description: Sets the spatial wavelength of auto-waves in pixels.

OnPhysicsImpact.description: Fires once per Physics instance per surface zone entry. Pass 0 to fire for any impacting instance.

instanceUID.name: Instance UID
instanceUID.desc: UID to filter for, or 0 for any.

IsAutoWavesEnabled.description: True if auto-wave oscillation is currently active.

IsIdle.description: True if the simulation has stopped ticking due to idle detection.

IsPhysicsAutoForceEnabled.description: True if Physics auto-force detection is currently active.

ImpactForce.description: The computed force applied to the surface. Valid inside OnPhysicsImpact only.

ImpactUID.description: UID of the impacting Physics instance. Valid inside OnPhysicsImpact only.

ImpactX.description: World X coordinate of the Physics impact. Valid inside OnPhysicsImpact only.

AutoWaveEnabled.description: 1 if auto-waves are currently enabled, 0 if disabled.

SurfaceY.description: World Y of the water surface at world X position x.
